title: Election Announcement
description: The Election Commission of India (ECI) announces the schedule, and the Model Code of Conduct comes into effect immediately.

title: Electoral Roll Updates
description: The final opportunity for citizens to register or update their details in the voter list before the freeze period.

title: Candidate Nomination
description: Candidates file their nominations and affidavits. Scrutiny of papers followed by a window for withdrawal.

title: Active Campaigning
description: Political parties and candidates reach out to the electorate through rallies, manifestos, and advertisements.

title: Polling Day
description: The day of decision. Citizens cast their votes at designated polling booths using EVMs and VVPATs.

title: Counting Day
description: Votes are counted under strict surveillance, and results are officially declared by the Returning Officer.

title: Government Formation
description: The majority party or coalition is invited to form the government, followed by the swearing-in ceremony.
